description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named fluent.runtime that runs on push and pull request to the master branch. The workflow has three jobs: unit, integration, and lint, each running on ubuntu-latest. The unit job runs unit tests with a matrix of Python versions and fluent-syntax versions, the integration job runs integration tests with Python 3.7 and continues on error, and the lint job runs flake8 linting with Python 3.7.
